subcodes.first_line: The Hidden Book enshrined within this manifest Temple proclaims: "There is none other God but Him, the All-Compelling." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الکتاب المکنون فی هذا الهیکل المشهود ینطق انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @exhortations and counsels, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
